verses.latin_vulgate: Post dies multos factum est verbum Domini ad Eliam, in anno tertio, dicens : Vade, et ostende te Achab, ut dem pluviam super faciem terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ יָמִ֣ים רַבִּ֔ים וּדְבַר־יְהֹוָ֗ה הָיָה֙ אֶל־אֵ֣לִיָּ֔הוּ בַּשָּׁנָ֥ה הַשְּׁלִישִׁ֖ית לֵאמֹ֑ר לֵ֚ךְ הֵרָאֵ֣ה אֶל־אַחְאָ֔ב וְאֶתְּנָ֥ה מָטָ֖ר עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הָֽאֲדָמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: After many days, the word of the Lord came to Elias, in the third year, saying: Go, and shew thyself to Achab, that I may give rain upon the face of the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja monen päivän perästä tuli Herran sana Elian tykö kolmantena vuonna, sanoen: mene ja osoita sinus Ahabille, ja minä annan sataa maan päälle.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass after many days, that the word of the Lord came to Elijah in the third year, saying, Go, shew thyself unto Ahab; and I will send rain upon the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ivit ergo Elias, ut ostenderet se Achab : erat autem fames vehemens in Samaria.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֙לֶךְ֙ אֵֽלִיָּ֔הוּ לְהֵרָא֖וֹת אֶל־אַחְאָ֑ב וְהָרָעָ֥ב חָזָ֖ק בְּשֹׁמְרֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Elias went to shew himself to Achab, and there was a grievous famine in Samaria.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Elia meni näyttämään itsiänsä Ahabille; vaan sangen kallis aika oli Samariassa.
verses.king_james: And Elijah went to shew himself unto Ahab. And there was a sore famine in Samaria.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vocavitque Achab Abdiam dispensatorem domus suæ : Abdias autem timebat Dominum valde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֣א אַחְאָ֔ב אֶל־עֹבַדְיָ֖הוּ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עַל־הַבָּ֑יִת וְעֹבַדְיָ֗הוּ הָיָ֥ה יָרֵ֛א אֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה מְאֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Achab called Abdias the governor of his house: now Abdias feared the Lord very much.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Ahab kutsui Obadian, joka oli hänen huoneensa haltia: (Ja Obadia pelkäsi Herraa suuresti.
verses.king_james: And Ahab called Obadiah, which was the governor of his house. (Now Obadiah feared the Lord greatly:

verses.latin_vulgate: Nam cum interficeret Jezabel prophetas Domini, tulit ille centum prophetas, et abscondit eos quinquagenos et quinquagenos in speluncis, et pavit eos pane et aqua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ בְּהַכְרִ֣ית אִיזֶ֔בֶל אֵ֖ת נְבִיאֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיִּקַּ֨ח עֹבַדְיָ֜הוּ מֵאָ֣ה נְבִיאִ֗ים וַֽיַּחְבִּיאֵ֞ם חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים אִישׁ֙ בַּמְּעָרָ֔ה וְכִלְכְּלָ֖ם לֶ֥חֶם וָמָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For when Jezabel killed the prophets of the Lord, he took a hundred prophets, and hid them by fifty and fifty in caves, and fed them with bread and water.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä kun Isebel hukutti Herran prophetat, otti Obadia sata prophetaa ja kätki ne, viisikymmentä kuhunkin luolaan, ja elätti heidät leivällä ja vedellä.)
verses.king_james: For it was so, when Jezebel cut off the prophets of the Lord, that Obadiah took an hundred prophets, and hid them by fifty in a cave, and fed them with bread and water.)

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit ergo Achab ad Abdiam : Vade in terram ad universos fontes aquarum, et in cunctas valles, si forte possimus invenire herbam, et salvare equos et mulos, et non penitus jumenta intereant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר אַחְאָב֙ אֶל־עֹ֣בַדְיָ֔הוּ לֵ֤ךְ בָּאָ֙רֶץ֙ אֶל־כׇּל־מַעְיְנֵ֣י הַמַּ֔יִם וְאֶ֖ל כׇּל־הַנְּחָלִ֑ים אוּלַ֣י ׀ נִמְצָ֣א חָצִ֗יר וּנְחַיֶּה֙ ס֣וּס וָפֶ֔רֶד וְל֥וֹא נַכְרִ֖ית מֵהַבְּהֵמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Achab said to Abdias: Go into the land unto all fountains of waters, and into all valleys, to see if we can find grass, and save the horses and mules, that the beasts may not utterly perish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi Ahab Obadialle: vaella maan lävitse kaikkein vesilähdetten tykö ja kaikkein ojain tykö, jos löydettäisiin ruohoja hevosille ja muuleille elatukseksi, ettei kaikki eläimet hukkuisi.
verses.king_james: And Ahab said unto Obadiah, Go into the land, unto all fountains of water, and unto all brooks: peradventure we may find grass to save the horses and mules alive, that we lose not all the beasts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Diviseruntque sibi regiones ut circuirent eas : Achab ibat per viam unam, et Abdias per viam alteram seorsum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְחַלְּק֥וּ לָהֶ֛ם אֶת־הָאָ֖רֶץ לַעֲבׇר־בָּ֑הּ אַחְאָ֞ב הָלַ֨ךְ בְּדֶ֤רֶךְ אֶחָד֙ לְבַדּ֔וֹ וְעֹבַדְיָ֛הוּ הָלַ֥ךְ בְּדֶרֶךְ־אֶחָ֖ד לְבַדּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they divided the countries between them, that they might go round about them: Achab went one way, and Abdias another way by himself.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he jakoivat itsensä vaeltamaan maata lävitse: Ahab vaelsi yksinänsä yhtä tietä myöten ja Obadia toista tietä yksinänsä.
verses.king_james: So they divided the land between them to pass throughout it: Ahab went one way by himself, and Obadiah went another way by himself.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque esset Abdias in via, Elias occurrit ei : qui cum cognovisset eum, cecidit super faciem suam, et ait : Num tu es, domine mi, Elias ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֤י עֹבַדְיָ֙הוּ֙ בַּדֶּ֔רֶךְ וְהִנֵּ֥ה אֵלִיָּ֖הוּ לִקְרָאת֑וֹ וַיַּכִּרֵ֙הוּ֙ וַיִּפֹּ֣ל עַל־פָּנָ֔יו וַיֹּ֕אמֶר הַאַתָּ֥ה זֶ֖ה אֲדֹנִ֥י אֵלִיָּֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And as Abdias was in the way, Elias met him: and he knew him, and fell on his face, and said: Art thou my lord Elias?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kun Obadia tiellä oli, katso, silloin kohtasi hänen Elia; ja kuin hän tunsi hänen, lankesi hän kasvoillensa ja sanoi: etkös ole herrani Elia?
verses.king_james: And as Obadiah was in the way, behold, Elijah met him: and he knew him, and fell on his face, and said, Art thou that my lord Elijah?

verses.latin_vulgate: Cui ille respondit : Ego. Vade, et dic domino tuo : Adest Elias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר ל֖וֹ אָ֑נִי לֵ֛ךְ אֱמֹ֥ר לַאדֹנֶ֖יךָ הִנֵּ֥ה אֵלִיָּֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he answered: I am. Go, and tell thy master: Elias is here.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän sanoi: olen; mene ja sano herralles: katso, Elia on tässä.
verses.king_james: And he answered him, I am: go, tell thy lord, Behold, Elijah is here.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ille : Quid peccavi, inquit, quoniam tradis me servum tuum in manu Achab, ut interficiat me ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֖אמֶר מֶ֣ה חָטָ֑אתִי כִּֽי־אַתָּ֞ה נֹתֵ֧ן אֶֽת־עַבְדְּךָ֛ בְּיַד־אַחְאָ֖ב לַהֲמִיתֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said: What have I sinned, that thou wouldst deliver me, thy servant, into the hand of Achab, that he should kill me?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi: mitä minä olen rikkonut, ettäs annat palvelias Ahabin käsiin tappaa minua?
verses.king_james: And he said, What have I sinned, that thou wouldest deliver thy servant into the hand of Ahab, to slay me?

verses.latin_vulgate: Vivit Dominus Deus tuus, quia non est gens aut regnum quo non miserit dominus meus te requirens : et respondentibus cunctis : Non est hic : adjuravit regna singula et gentes, eo quod minime reperireris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חַ֣י ׀ יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֗יךָ אִם־יֶשׁ־גּ֤וֹי וּמַמְלָכָה֙ אֲ֠שֶׁ֠ר לֹא־שָׁלַ֨ח אֲדֹנִ֥י שָׁם֙ לְבַקֶּשְׁךָ֔ וְאָמְר֖וּ אָ֑יִן וְהִשְׁבִּ֤יעַ אֶת־הַמַּמְלָכָה֙ וְאֶת־הַגּ֔וֹי כִּ֖י לֹ֥א יִמְצָאֶֽכָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: As the Lord thy God liveth, there is no nation or kingdom, whither my lord hath not sent to seek thee: and when all answered: He is not here: he took an oath of every kingdom and nation, because thou wast not found.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin totta kuin Herra sinun Jumalas elää, ei ole yhtään kansaa eli valtakuntaa, kuhunka minun herrani ei ole lähettänyt, sinua etsimään. Ja koska he ovat sanoneet: ei hän ole tässä, on hän vannottanut sitä valtakuntaa ja kansaa, ettet sinä ole löydetty.
verses.king_james: As the Lord thy God liveth, there is no nation or kingdom, whither my lord hath not sent to seek thee: and when they said, He is not there; he took an oath of the kingdom and nation, that they found thee not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc tu dicis mihi : Vade, et dic domino tuo : Adest Elias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֖ה אַתָּ֣ה אֹמֵ֑ר לֵ֛ךְ אֱמֹ֥ר לַאדֹנֶ֖יךָ הִנֵּ֥ה אֵלִיָּֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And now thou sayest to me: Go and tell thy master: Elias is here.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nyt sinä sanot: mene ja sano herralles: katso, Elia on tässä.
verses.king_james: And now thou sayest, Go, tell thy lord, Behold, Elijah is here.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque recessero a te, spiritus Domini asportabit te in locum quem ego ignoro : et ingressus nuntiabo Achab, et non inveniens te, interficiet me : servus autem tuus timet Dominum ab infantia sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֞ה אֲנִ֣י ׀ אֵלֵ֣ךְ מֵאִתָּ֗ךְ וְר֨וּחַ יְהֹוָ֤ה ׀ יִֽשָּׂאֲךָ֙ עַ֚ל אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹֽא־אֵדָ֔ע וּבָ֨אתִי לְהַגִּ֧יד לְאַחְאָ֛ב וְלֹ֥א יִֽמְצָאֲךָ֖ וַהֲרָגָ֑נִי וְעַבְדְּךָ֛ יָרֵ֥א אֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה מִנְּעֻרָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when I am gone from thee, the Spirit of the Lord will carry thee into a place that I know not: and I shall go in and tell Achab; and he, not finding thee, will kill me: but thy servant feareth the Lord from his infancy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja taitais tapahtua, kuin minä menisin pois sinun tyköäs, niin ottais Herran henki sinun pois, ja en minä tietäisi kuhunka, ja minä sitte tulisin ja sanoisin sen Ahabille, ja hän ei löytäisi sinua, niin hän tappais minun. Mutta minä sinun palvelias pelkään Herraa hamasta nuoruudestani.
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass, as soon as I am gone from thee, that the Spirit of the Lord shall carry thee whither I know not; and so when I come and tell Ahab, and he cannot find thee, he shall slay me: but I thy servant fear the Lord from my youth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid non indicatum est tibi domino meo quid fecerim cum interficeret Jezabel prophetas Domini, quod absconderim de prophetis Domini centum viros, quinquagenos et quinquagenos, in speluncis, et paverim eos pane et aqua ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲלֹֽא־הֻגַּ֤ד לַֽאדֹנִי֙ אֵ֣ת אֲשֶׁר־עָשִׂ֔יתִי בַּהֲרֹ֣ג אִיזֶ֔בֶל אֵ֖ת נְבִיאֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וָאַחְבִּא֩ מִנְּבִיאֵ֨י יְהֹוָ֜ה מֵ֣אָה אִ֗ישׁ חֲמִשִּׁ֨ים חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים אִישׁ֙ בַּמְּעָרָ֔ה וָאֲכַלְכְּלֵ֖ם לֶ֥חֶם וָמָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Hath it not been told thee, my lord, what I did when Jezabel killed the prophets of the Lord; how I hid a hundred men of the prophets of the Lord, by fifty and fifty in caves, and fed them with bread and water?
verses.finnish_biblia: Eikö minun herralleni ole sanottu, mitä minä tehnyt olen, kuin Isebel tappoi Herran prophetat? ja minä kätkin sata Herran prophetaa luoliin, viisikymmentä tänne ja viisikymmentä sinne, ja ruokin heidät leivällä ja vedellä.
verses.king_james: Was it not told my lord what I did when Jezebel slew the prophets of the Lord, how I hid an hundred men of the Lord’s prophets by fifty in a cave, and fed them with bread and water?

verses.latin_vulgate: et nunc tu dicis : Vade, et dic domino tuo : Adest Elias : ut interficiat me ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּה֙ אַתָּ֣ה אֹמֵ֔ר לֵ֛ךְ אֱמֹ֥ר לַאדֹנֶ֖יךָ הִנֵּ֣ה אֵלִיָּ֑הוּ וַהֲרָגָֽנִי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And now thou sayest: Go and tell thy master: Elias is here: that he may kill me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nyt sinä sanot: mene ja sano herralles: katso, Elia on tässä: että hän minun tappais.
verses.king_james: And now thou sayest, Go, tell thy lord, Behold, Elijah is here: and he shall slay me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Elias : Vivit Dominus exercituum, ante cujus vultum sto, quia hodie apparebo ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ אֵֽלִיָּ֔הוּ חַ֚י יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָמַ֖דְתִּי לְפָנָ֑יו כִּ֥י הַיּ֖וֹם אֵרָאֶ֥ה אֵלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Elias said: As the Lord of hosts liveth, before whose face I stand, this day I will shew myself unto him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Elia sanoi: niin totta kuin Herra Zebaot elää, jonka edessä minä seison: tänäpänä minä itseni hänelle ilmoitan.
verses.king_james: And Elijah said, As the Lord of hosts liveth, before whom I stand, I will surely shew myself unto him to day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abiit ergo Abdias in occursum Achab, et indicavit ei : venitque Achab in occursum Eliæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֧לֶךְ עֹבַדְיָ֛הוּ לִקְרַ֥את אַחְאָ֖ב וַיַּגֶּד־ל֑וֹ וַיֵּ֥לֶךְ אַחְאָ֖ב לִקְרַ֥את אֵלִיָּֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Abdias therefore went to meet Achab, and told him: and Achab came to meet Elias.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin meni Obadia Ahabia vastaan ja sanoi nämät hänelle, ja Ahab meni Eliaa vastaan.
verses.king_james: So Obadiah went to meet Ahab, and told him: and Ahab went to meet Elijah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cum vidisset eum, ait : Tune es ille, qui conturbas Israël ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֛י כִּרְא֥וֹת אַחְאָ֖ב אֶת־אֵלִיָּ֑הוּ וַיֹּ֤אמֶר אַחְאָב֙ אֵלָ֔יו הַאַתָּ֥ה זֶ֖ה עֹכֵ֥ר יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he had seen him, he said: Art thou he that troublest Israel?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Ahab näki Elian, sanoi Ahab hänelle: etkö sinä ole se, joka Israelin villitset?
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when Ahab saw Elijah, that Ahab said unto him, Art thou he that troubleth Israel?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ille ait : Non ego turbavi Israël, sed tu, et domus patris tui, qui dereliquistis mandata Domini, et secuti estis Baalim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֗אמֶר לֹ֤א עָכַ֙רְתִּי֙ אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל כִּ֥י אִם־אַתָּ֖ה וּבֵ֣ית אָבִ֑יךָ בַּעֲזׇבְכֶם֙ אֶת־מִצְוֺ֣ת יְהֹוָ֔ה וַתֵּ֖לֶךְ אַחֲרֵ֥י הַבְּעָלִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said: I have not troubled Israel, but thou and thy father's house, who have forsaken the commandments of the Lord, and have followed Baalim.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän sanoi: en minä villitse Israelia, mutta sinä ja sinun isäs huone, että te olette hyljänneet Herran käskyt, ja sinä vaellat Baalin jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And he answered, I have not troubled Israel; but thou, and thy father’s house, in that ye have forsaken the commandments of the Lord, and thou hast followed Baalim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen nunc mitte, et congrega ad me universum Israël in monte Carmeli, et prophetas Baal quadringentos quinquaginta, prophetasque lucorum quadringentos, qui comedunt de mensa Jezabel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה שְׁלַ֨ח קְבֹ֥ץ אֵלַ֛י אֶת־כׇּל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל אֶל־הַ֣ר הַכַּרְמֶ֑ל וְאֶת־נְבִיאֵ֨י הַבַּ֜עַל אַרְבַּ֧ע מֵא֣וֹת וַחֲמִשִּׁ֗ים וּנְבִיאֵ֤י הָאֲשֵׁרָה֙ אַרְבַּ֣ע מֵא֔וֹת אֹכְלֵ֖י שֻׁלְחַ֥ן אִיזָֽבֶל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Nevertheless send now, and gather unto me all Israel, unto Mount Carmel, and the prophets of Baal four hundred and fifty, and the prophets of the groves four hundred, who eat at Jezabel's table.
verses.finnish_biblia: Lähetä siis nyt kokoamaan minun tyköni koko Israel Karmelin vuorelle, ja neljäsataa ja viisikymmentä Baalin prophetaa ja neljäsataa metsistöin prophetaa, jotka syövät Isebelin pöydältä.
verses.king_james: Now therefore send, and gather to me all Israel unto mount Carmel, and the prophets of Baal four hundred and fifty, and the prophets of the groves four hundred, which eat at Jezebel’s table.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit Achab ad omnes filios Israël, et congregavit prophetas in monte Carmeli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֥ח אַחְאָ֖ב בְּכׇל־בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיִּקְבֹּ֥ץ אֶת־הַנְּבִיאִ֖ים אֶל־הַ֥ר הַכַּרְמֶֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Achab sent to all the children of Israel, and gathered together the prophets unto mount Carmel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin lähetti Ahab kaikkein Israelin lasten tykö ja kokosi prophetat Karmelin vuorelle.
verses.king_james: So Ahab sent unto all the children of Israel, and gathered the prophets together unto mount Carmel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Accedens autem Elias ad omnem populum, ait : Usquequo claudicatis in duas partes ? si Dominus est Deus, sequimini eum : si autem Baal, sequimini illum. Et non respondit ei populus verbum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּגַּ֨שׁ אֵלִיָּ֜הוּ אֶל־כׇּל־הָעָ֗ם וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ עַד־מָתַ֞י אַתֶּ֣ם פֹּסְחִים֮ עַל־שְׁתֵּ֣י הַסְּעִפִּים֒ אִם־יְהֹוָ֤ה הָאֱלֹהִים֙ לְכ֣וּ אַחֲרָ֔יו וְאִם־הַבַּ֖עַל לְכ֣וּ אַחֲרָ֑יו וְלֹא־עָנ֥וּ הָעָ֛ם אֹת֖וֹ דָּבָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Elias coming to all the people, said: How long do you halt between two sides? If the Lord be God, follow him: but if Baal, then follow him. And the people did not answer him a word.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin astui Elia kaiken kansan eteen ja sanoi: kuinka kauvan te onnutte molemmille puolille? Jos Herra on Jumala, niin vaeltakaat hänen jälkeensä, mutta jos Baal, niin vaeltakaat hänen jälkeensä; ja ei kansa häntä mitään vastannut.
verses.king_james: And Elijah came unto all the people, and said, How long halt ye between two opinions? if the Lord be God, follow him: but if Baal, then follow him. And the people answered him not a word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait rursus Elias ad populum : Ego remansi propheta Domini solus : prophetæ autem Baal quadringenti et quinquaginta viri sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר אֵלִיָּ֙הוּ֙ אֶל־הָעָ֔ם אֲנִ֞י נוֹתַ֧רְתִּי נָבִ֛יא לַיהֹוָ֖ה לְבַדִּ֑י וּנְבִיאֵ֣י הַבַּ֔עַל אַרְבַּע־מֵא֥וֹת וַחֲמִשִּׁ֖ים אִֽישׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Elias said again to the people: I only remain a prophet of the Lord: but the prophets of Baal are four hundred and fifty men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi Elia kansalle: minä olen ainoasti jäänyt Herran prophetaista; mutta Baalin prophetaita on neljäsataa ja viisikymmentä miestä.
verses.king_james: Then said Elijah unto the people, I, even I only, remain a prophet of the Lord; but Baal’s prophets are four hundred and fifty men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dentur nobis duo boves, et illi eligant sibi bovem unum, et in frusta cædentes ponant super ligna, ignem autem non supponant : et ego faciam bovem alterum, et imponam super ligna, ignem autem non supponam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִתְּנוּ־לָ֜נוּ שְׁנַ֣יִם פָּרִ֗ים וְיִבְחֲר֣וּ לָהֶם֩ הַפָּ֨ר הָאֶחָ֜ד וִינַתְּחֻ֗הוּ וְיָשִׂ֙ימוּ֙ עַל־הָ֣עֵצִ֔ים וְאֵ֖שׁ לֹ֣א יָשִׂ֑ימוּ וַאֲנִ֞י אֶעֱשֶׂ֣ה ׀ אֶת־הַפָּ֣ר הָאֶחָ֗ד וְנָֽתַתִּי֙ עַל־הָ֣עֵצִ֔ים וְאֵ֖שׁ לֹ֥א אָשִֽׂים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let two bullocks be given us, and let them choose one bullock for themselves, and cut it in pieces, and lay it upon wood, but put no fire under: and I will dress the other bullock, and lay it on wood, and put no fire under it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin antakaat nyt meille kaksi mullia ja antakaat heidän valita toisen mullin ja hakata kappaleiksi, ja pankaan puiden päälle, mutta älkään siihen panko tulta: ja minä otan toisen mullin ja panen myös puiden päälle, ja en pane siihen tulta.
verses.king_james: Let them therefore give us two bullocks; and let them choose one bullock for themselves, and cut it in pieces, and lay it on wood, and put no fire under: and I will dress the other bullock, and lay it on wood, and put no fire under:

verses.latin_vulgate: Invocate nomina deorum vestrorum, et ego invocabo nomen Domini mei : et Deus qui exaudierit per ignem, ipse sit Deus. Respondens omnis populus ait : Optima propositio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּקְרָאתֶ֞ם בְּשֵׁ֣ם אֱלֹהֵיכֶ֗ם וַֽאֲנִי֙ אֶקְרָ֣א בְשֵׁם־יְהֹוָ֔ה וְהָיָ֧ה הָאֱלֹהִ֛ים אֲשֶׁר־יַעֲנֶ֥ה בָאֵ֖שׁ ה֣וּא הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וַיַּ֧עַן כׇּל־הָעָ֛ם וַיֹּאמְר֖וּ ט֥וֹב הַדָּבָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Call ye on the names of your gods, and I will call on the name of my Lord: and the God that shall answer by fire, let him be God. And all the people answering, said: A very good proposal.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja huutakaat te teidän jumalainne nimeä, ja minä huudan Herran nimeä: kumpi Jumala vastaa tulen kautta, hän olkoon Jumala. Ja kaikki kansa vastasi ja sanoi: se on oikein.
verses.king_james: And call ye on the name of your gods, and I will call on the name of the Lord: and the God that answereth by fire, let him be God. And all the people answered and said, It is well spoken.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit ergo Elias prophetis Baal : Eligite vobis bovem unum, et facite primi, quia vos plures estis : et invocate nomina deorum vestrorum, ignemque non supponatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר אֵלִיָּ֜הוּ לִנְבִיאֵ֣י הַבַּ֗עַל בַּחֲר֨וּ לָכֶ֜ם הַפָּ֤ר הָאֶחָד֙ וַעֲשׂ֣וּ רִאשֹׁנָ֔ה כִּ֥י אַתֶּ֖ם הָרַבִּ֑ים וְקִרְאוּ֙ בְּשֵׁ֣ם אֱלֹהֵיכֶ֔ם וְאֵ֖שׁ לֹ֥א תָשִֽׂימוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then Elias said to the prophets of Baal: Choose you one bullock and dress it first, because you are many: and call on the names of your gods; but put no fire under.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Elia sanoi Baalin prophetaille: valitkaat teillenne toinen mulli, ja tehkäät te ensin, sillä teitä on monta, ja huutakaat teidän jumalainne nimeä, ja älkäät siihen tulta panko.
verses.king_james: And Elijah said unto the prophets of Baal, Choose you one bullock for yourselves, and dress it first; for ye are many; and call on the name of your gods, but put no fire under.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui cum tulissent bovem quem dederat eis, fecerunt : et invocabant nomen Baal de mane usque ad meridiem, dicentes : Baal, exaudi nos. Et non erat vox, nec qui responderet : transiliebantque altare quod fecerant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֠יִּקְח֠וּ אֶת־הַפָּ֨ר אֲשֶׁר־נָתַ֣ן לָהֶם֮ וַֽיַּעֲשׂוּ֒ וַיִּקְרְא֣וּ בְשֵׁם־הַ֠בַּ֠עַל מֵהַבֹּ֨קֶר וְעַד־הַצׇּהֳרַ֤יִם לֵאמֹר֙ הַבַּ֣עַל עֲנֵ֔נוּ וְאֵ֥ין ק֖וֹל וְאֵ֣ין עֹנֶ֑ה וַֽיְפַסְּח֔וּ עַל־הַמִּזְבֵּ֖חַ אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשָֽׂה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they took the bullock, which he gave them, and dressed it: and they called on the name of Baal from morning even until noon, saying: O Baal, hear us. But there was no voice, nor any that answered: and they leaped over the altar that they had made.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he ottivat mullin, jonka hän heille antoi, ja valmistivat ja huusivat Baalin nimeä huomenesta puolipäivään asti, sanoen: Baal, kuule meitä! mutta ei siinä ollut ääntä eli vastaajaa; ja he hyppelivät alttarin ympärillä, jonka he tehneet olivat.
verses.king_james: And they took the bullock which was given them, and they dressed it, and called on the name of Baal from morning even until noon, saying, O Baal, hear us. But there was no voice, nor any that answered. And they leaped upon the altar which was made.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque esset jam meridies, illudebat illis Elias, dicens : Clamate voce majore : deus enim est, et forsitan loquitur, aut in diversorio est, aut in itinere, aut certe dormit, ut excitetur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֨י בַֽצׇּהֳרַ֜יִם וַיְהַתֵּ֧ל בָּהֶ֣ם אֵלִיָּ֗הוּ וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ קִרְא֤וּ בְקוֹל־גָּדוֹל֙ כִּֽי־אֱלֹהִ֣ים ה֔וּא כִּ֣י שִׂ֧יחַ וְכִי־שִׂ֛יג ל֖וֹ וְכִי־דֶ֣רֶךְ ל֑וֹ אוּלַ֛י יָשֵׁ֥ן ה֖וּא וְיִקָֽץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when it was now noon, Elias jested at them, saying: Cry with a louder voice: for he is a god; and perhaps he is talking, or is in an inn, or on a journey; or perhaps he is asleep, and must be awaked.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kun jo puolipäivä oli, pilkkasi heitä Elia ja sanoi: huutakaat vahvasti; sillä hän on jumala, hän ajattelee jotakin, eli on jotakin toimittamista, eli on matkalla, eli jos hän makaa, että hän heräis.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass at noon, that Elijah mocked them, and said, Cry aloud: for he is a god; either he is talking, or he is pursuing, or he is in a journey, or peradventure he sleepeth, and must be awaked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Clamabant ergo voce magna, et incidebant se juxta ritum suum cultris et lanceolis, donec perfunderentur sanguine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּקְרְאוּ֙ בְּק֣וֹל גָּד֔וֹל וַיִּתְגֹּֽדְדוּ֙ כְּמִשְׁפָּטָ֔ם בַּחֲרָב֖וֹת וּבָרְמָחִ֑ים עַד־שְׁפׇךְ־דָּ֖ם עֲלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: So they cried with a loud voice, and cut themselves after their manner with knives and lancets, till they were all covered with blood.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he huusivat suurella äänellä, ja viileskelivät itsiänsä veitsillä ja naskaleilla tavallansa, niin että he verta tiukkuivat.
verses.king_james: And they cried aloud, and cut themselves after their manner with knives and lancets, till the blood gushed out upon them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Postquam autem transiit meridies, et illis prophetantibus venerat tempus quo sacrificium offerri solet, nec audiebatur vox, nec aliquis respondebat, nec attendebat orantes,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ כַּעֲבֹ֣ר הַֽצׇּהֳרַ֔יִם וַיִּֽתְנַבְּא֔וּ עַ֖ד לַעֲל֣וֹת הַמִּנְחָ֑ה וְאֵֽין־ק֥וֹל וְאֵין־עֹנֶ֖ה וְאֵ֥ין קָֽשֶׁב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And after midday was past, and while they were prophesying, the time was come of offering sacrifice, and there was no voice heard, nor did any one answer, nor regard them as they prayed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin puolipäivä kulunut oli, propheterasivat he siihenasti, että ruokauhri uhrattaman piti; ja ei ollut siinä ääntä eli vastaajaa, elikkä joka vaaria otti.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when midday was past, and they prophesied until the time of the offering of the evening sacrifice, that there was neither voice, nor any to answer, nor any that regarded.

verses.latin_vulgate: dixit Elias omni populo : Venite ad me.   Et accedente ad se populo, curavit altare Domini quod destructum fuerat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר אֵלִיָּ֤הוּ לְכׇל־הָעָם֙ גְּשׁ֣וּ אֵלַ֔י וַיִּגְּשׁ֥וּ כׇל־הָעָ֖ם אֵלָ֑יו וַיְרַפֵּ֛א אֶת־מִזְבַּ֥ח יְהֹוָ֖ה הֶהָרֽוּס׃
verses.douay_rheims: Elias said to all the people: Come ye unto me. And the people coming near unto him, he repaired the altar of the Lord, that was broken down:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi Elia kaikelle kansalle: tulkaat minun tyköni; ja kuin kaikki kansa tuli hänen tykönsä, paransi hän Herran alttarin, joka kukistunut oli.
verses.king_james: And Elijah said unto all the people, Come near unto me. And all the people came near unto him. And he repaired the altar of the Lord that was broken down.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tulit duodecim lapides juxta numerum tribuum filiorum Jacob, ad quem factus est sermo Domini, dicens : Israël erit nomen tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֣ח אֵלִיָּ֗הוּ שְׁתֵּ֤ים עֶשְׂרֵה֙ אֲבָנִ֔ים כְּמִסְפַּ֖ר שִׁבְטֵ֣י בְנֵֽי־יַעֲקֹ֑ב אֲשֶׁר֩ הָיָ֨ה דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֤ה אֵלָיו֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל יִהְיֶ֥ה שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he took twelve stones, according to the number of the tribes of the sons of Jacob to whom the word of the Lord came, saying: Israel shall be thy name.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Elia otti kaksitoistakymmentä kiveä Jakobin lasten luvun jälkeen (jonka tykö Herran sana tapahtunut oli, sanoen: Israel pitää sinun nimes oleman),
verses.king_james: And Elijah took twelve stones, according to the number of the tribes of the sons of Jacob, unto whom the word of the Lord came, saying, Israel shall be thy name:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ædificavit de lapidibus altare in nomine Domini : fecitque aquæductum, quasi per duas aratiunculas in circuitu altaris,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּבְנֶ֧ה אֶת־הָאֲבָנִ֛ים מִזְבֵּ֖חַ בְּשֵׁ֣ם יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיַּ֣עַשׂ תְּעָלָ֗ה כְּבֵית֙ סָאתַ֣יִם זֶ֔רַע סָבִ֖יב לַמִּזְבֵּֽחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he built with the stones an altar to the name of the Lord: and he made a trench for water, of the breadth of two furrows, round about the altar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja rakensi niistä kivistä alttarin Herran nimeen, ja teki kuopan alttaria ympäri kahden jyvämitan leveydeltä,
verses.king_james: And with the stones he built an altar in the name of the Lord: and he made a trench about the altar, as great as would contain two measures of seed.

verses.latin_vulgate: et composuit ligna : divisitque per membra bovem, et posuit super ligna,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיַּעֲרֹ֖ךְ אֶת־הָעֵצִ֑ים וַיְנַתַּח֙ אֶת־הַפָּ֔ר וַיָּ֖שֶׂם עַל־הָעֵצִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he laid the wood in order, and cut the bullock in pieces, and laid it upon the wood.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja latoi puut, ja hakkasi mullin kappaleiksi, ja pani sen puiden päälle,
verses.king_james: And he put the wood in order, and cut the bullock in pieces, and laid him on the wood, and said, Fill four barrels with water, and pour it on the burnt sacrifice, and on the wood.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ait : Implete quatuor hydrias aqua, et fundite super holocaustum et super ligna. Rursumque dixit : Etiam secundo hoc facite. Qui cum fecissent secundo, ait : Etiam tertio idipsum facite. Feceruntque tertio,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֗אמֶר מִלְא֨וּ אַרְבָּעָ֤ה כַדִּים֙ מַ֔יִם וְיִֽצְק֥וּ עַל־הָעֹלָ֖ה וְעַל־הָעֵצִ֑ים וַיֹּ֤אמֶר שְׁנוּ֙ וַיִּשְׁנ֔וּ וַיֹּ֥אמֶר שַׁלֵּ֖שׁוּ וַיְשַׁלֵּֽשׁוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said: Fill four buckets with water, and pour it upon the burnt offering, and upon the wood. And again he said: Do the same the second time. And when they had done it the second time, he said: Do the same also the third time. And they did so the third time.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi: täyttäkäät neljä kadia vedellä ja kaatakaat se polttouhrin ja puiden päälle; ja hän sanoi: tehkäät se vielä toinen kerta; ja he tekivät sen toisen kerran; ja hän sanoi: tehkäät se vielä kolmas kerta; ja he tekivät sen kolmannen kerran.
verses.king_james: And he said, Do it the second time. And they did it the second time. And he said, Do it the third time. And they did it the third time.

verses.latin_vulgate: et currebant aquæ circum altare, et fossa aquæductus repleta est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּלְכ֣וּ הַמַּ֔יִם סָבִ֖יב לַמִּזְבֵּ֑חַ וְגַ֥ם אֶת־הַתְּעָלָ֖ה מִלֵּא־מָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the water run round about the altar, and the trench was filled with water.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vesi juoksi alttaria ympäri, että kuoppakin täytettiin vedestä.
verses.king_james: And the water ran round about the altar; and he filled the trench also with water.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque jam tempus esset ut offerretur holocaustum, accedens Elias propheta ait : Domine Deus Abraham, et Isaac, et Israël, ostende hodie quia tu es Deus Israël, et ego servus tuus, et juxta præceptum tuum feci omnia verba hæc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י ׀ בַּעֲל֣וֹת הַמִּנְחָ֗ה וַיִּגַּ֞שׁ אֵלִיָּ֣הוּ הַנָּבִיא֮ וַיֹּאמַר֒ יְהֹוָ֗ה אֱלֹהֵי֙ אַבְרָהָם֙ יִצְחָ֣ק וְיִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל הַיּ֣וֹם יִוָּדַ֗ע כִּֽי־אַתָּ֧ה אֱלֹהִ֛ים בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל וַאֲנִ֣י עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ (ובדבריך) [וּבִדְבָרְךָ֣] עָשִׂ֔יתִי אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֖ים הָאֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when it was now time to offer the holocaust, Elias, the prophet, came near and said: O Lord God of Abraham, and Isaac, and Israel, shew this day that thou art the God of Israel, and I thy servant, and that according to thy commandment I have done all these things.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koska ruokauhri piti uhrattaman, astui propheta Elia edes ja sanoi: Herra Abrahamin, Isaakin ja Israelin Jumala! ilmoita tänäpänä, että sinä olet Israelin Jumala, ja minä sinun palvelias, ja että minä nämä kaikki sinun sanas jälkeen tehnyt olen.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass at the time of the offering of the evening sacrifice, that Elijah the prophet came near, and said, Lord God of Abraham, Isaac, and of Israel, let it be known this day that thou art God in Israel, and that I am thy servant, and that I have done all these things at thy word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exaudi me, Domine, exaudi me : ut discat populus iste quia tu es Dominus Deus, et tu convertisti cor eorum iterum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲנֵ֤נִי יְהֹוָה֙ עֲנֵ֔נִי וְיֵֽדְעוּ֙ הָעָ֣ם הַזֶּ֔ה כִּֽי־אַתָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וְאַתָּ֛ה הֲסִבֹּ֥תָ אֶת־לִבָּ֖ם אֲחֹרַנִּֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: Dear me, O Lord, hear me: that this people may learn that thou art the Lord God, and that thou hast turned their heart again.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuule minua Herra, kuule minua, että tämä kansa tietäis sinun olevan Herran Jumalan; ettäs kääntäisit heidän sydämensä takaisin.
verses.king_james: Hear me, O Lord, hear me, that this people may know that thou art the Lord God, and that thou hast turned their heart back again.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cecidit autem ignis Domini, et voravit holocaustum, et ligna, et lapides, pulverem quoque, et aquam quæ erat in aquæductu lambens.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּפֹּ֣ל אֵשׁ־יְהֹוָ֗ה וַתֹּ֤אכַל אֶת־הָעֹלָה֙ וְאֶת־הָֽעֵצִ֔ים וְאֶת־הָאֲבָנִ֖ים וְאֶת־הֶֽעָפָ֑ר וְאֶת־הַמַּ֥יִם אֲשֶׁר־בַּתְּעָלָ֖ה לִחֵֽכָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then the fire of the Lord fell, and consumed the holocaust, and the wood, and the stones, and the dust, and licked up the water that was in the trench.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin putosi Herran tuli ja poltti polttouhrin, puut, kivet ja mullan, ja nuoli veden kuopasta.
verses.king_james: Then the fire of the Lord fell, and consumed the burnt sacrifice, and the wood, and the stones, and the dust, and licked up the water that was in the trench.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod cum vidisset omnis populus, cecidit in faciem suam, et ait : Dominus ipse est Deus, Dominus ipse est Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּרְא֙ כׇּל־הָעָ֔ם וַֽיִּפְּל֖וּ עַל־פְּנֵיהֶ֑ם וַיֹּ֣אמְר֔וּ יְהֹוָה֙ ה֣וּא הָאֱלֹהִ֔ים יְהֹוָ֖ה ה֥וּא הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when all the people saw this, they fell on their faces, and they said: The Lord, he is God; the Lord, he is God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin kaikki kansa näki sen, heittäysivät he kasvoillensa ja sanoivat: Herra on Jumala, Herra on Jumala.
verses.king_james: And when all the people saw it, they fell on their faces: and they said, The Lord, he is the God; the Lord, he is the God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Elias ad eos : Apprehendite prophetas Baal, et ne unus quidem effugiat ex eis. Quos cum apprehendissent, duxit eos Elias ad torrentem Cison, et interfecit eos ibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֩אמֶר֩ אֵלִיָּ֨הוּ לָהֶ֜ם תִּפְשׂ֣וּ ׀ אֶת־נְבִיאֵ֣י הַבַּ֗עַל אִ֛ישׁ אַל־יִמָּלֵ֥ט מֵהֶ֖ם וַֽיִּתְפְּשׂ֑וּם וַיּוֹרִדֵ֤ם אֵלִיָּ֙הוּ֙ אֶל־נַ֣חַל קִישׁ֔וֹן וַיִּשְׁחָטֵ֖ם שָֽׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Elias said to them: Take the prophets of Baal, and let not one of them escape. And when they had taken them, Elias brought them down to the torrent Cison, and killed them there.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Elia sanoi heille: ottakaat Baalin prophetat kiinni, ettei yksikään heistä pääsisi. Ja he ottivat heidät kiinni; ja Elia vei heidät Kisonin ojan tykö ja tappoi heidät siellä.
verses.king_james: And Elijah said unto them, Take the prophets of Baal; let not one of them escape. And they took them: and Elijah brought them down to the brook Kishon, and slew them there.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Elias ad Achab : Ascende, comede, et bibe, quia sonus multæ pluviæ est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר אֵלִיָּ֙הוּ֙ לְאַחְאָ֔ב עֲלֵ֖ה אֱכֹ֣ל וּשְׁתֵ֑ה כִּי־ק֖וֹל הֲמ֥וֹן הַגָּֽשֶׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Elias said to Achab: Go up, eat and drink: for there is a sound of abundance of rain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Elia sanoi Ahabille: mene ylös, syö ja juo; sillä suuren sateen hyminä kuuluu.
verses.king_james: And Elijah said unto Ahab, Get thee up, eat and drink; for there is a sound of abundance of rain.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascendit Achab ut comederet et biberet : Elias autem ascendit in verticem Carmeli, et pronus in terram posuit faciem suam inter genua sua,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲלֶ֥ה אַחְאָ֖ב לֶאֱכֹ֣ל וְלִשְׁתּ֑וֹת וְאֵ֨לִיָּ֜הוּ עָלָ֨ה אֶל־רֹ֤אשׁ הַכַּרְמֶל֙ וַיִּגְהַ֣ר אַ֔רְצָה וַיָּ֥שֶׂם פָּנָ֖יו בֵּ֥ין בִּרְכָּֽו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Achab went up to eat and drink: and Elias went up to the top of Carmel, and casting himself down upon the earth, put his face between his knees,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Ahab meni syömään ja juomaan, meni Elia Karmelin kukkulalle, ja lankesi maahan, ja kumarsi kasvoillensa, ja pani päänsä polviensa välille,
verses.king_james: So Ahab went up to eat and to drink. And Elijah went up to the top of Carmel; and he cast himself down upon the earth, and put his face between his knees,

verses.latin_vulgate: et dixit ad puerum suum : Ascende, et prospice contra mare. Qui cum ascendisset, et contemplatus esset, ait : Non est quidquam. Et rursum ait illi : Revertere septem vicibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֶֽל־נַעֲר֗וֹ עֲלֵה־נָא֙ הַבֵּ֣ט דֶּֽרֶךְ־יָ֔ם וַיַּ֙עַל֙ וַיַּבֵּ֔ט וַיֹּ֖אמֶר אֵ֣ין מְא֑וּמָה וַיֹּ֕אמֶר שֻׁ֖ב שֶׁ֥בַע פְּעָמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to his servant: Go up, and look towards the sea. And he went up, and looked, and said: There is nothing. And again he said to him: Return seven times.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi palveliallensa: mene nyt ylös ja katso meren puoleen. Hän meni ylös, katsoi ja sanoi: ei siellä ole mitään. Hän sanoi: mene vielä sinne seitsemän kertaa.
verses.king_james: And said to his servant, Go up now, look toward the sea. And he went up, and looked, and said, There is nothing. And he said, Go again seven times.

verses.latin_vulgate: In septima autem vice, ecce nubecula parva quasi vestigium hominis ascendebat de mari. Qui ait : Ascende, et dic Achab : Junge currum tuum et descende, ne occupet te pluvia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ בַּשְּׁבִעִ֔ית וַיֹּ֗אמֶר הִנֵּה־עָ֛ב קְטַנָּ֥ה כְּכַף־אִ֖ישׁ עֹלָ֣ה מִיָּ֑ם וַיֹּ֗אמֶר עֲלֵ֨ה אֱמֹ֤ר אֶל־אַחְאָב֙ אֱסֹ֣ר וָרֵ֔ד וְלֹ֥א יַעֲצׇרְכָ֖ה הַגָּֽשֶׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And at the seventh time: Behold a little cloud arose out of the sea like a man's foot. And he said: Go up, and say to Achab: Prepare thy chariot, and go down, lest the rain prevent thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja seitsemännellä kerralla sanoi hän: katso sieltä nousee vähä pilvi merestä, niinkuin miehen kämmen. Hän sanoi: mene ja sano Ahabille: valjasta ja mene, ettei sade sinua käsittäisi.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass at the seventh time, that he said, Behold, there ariseth a little cloud out of the sea, like a man’s hand. And he said, Go up, say unto Ahab, Prepare thy chariot, and get thee down, that the rain stop thee not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque se verteret huc atque illuc, ecce cæli contenebrati sunt, et nubes, et ventus, et facta est pluvia grandis. Ascendens itaque Achab, abiit in Jezrahel :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י ׀ עַד־כֹּ֣ה וְעַד־כֹּ֗ה וְהַשָּׁמַ֙יִם֙ הִֽתְקַדְּרוּ֙ עָבִ֣ים וְר֔וּחַ וַיְהִ֖י גֶּ֣שֶׁם גָּד֑וֹל וַיִּרְכַּ֥ב אַחְאָ֖ב וַיֵּ֥לֶךְ יִזְרְעֶֽאלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And while he turned himself this way and that way, behold the heavens grew dark, with clouds and wind, and there fell a great rain. And Achab getting up, went away to Jezrahel:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sillä välillä tuli taivas pilvistä mustaksi ja tuulesta, ja tuli sangen suuri sade. Mutta Ahab matkusti ja tuli Jisreeliin.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass in the mean while, that the heaven was black with clouds and wind, and there was a great rain. And Ahab rode, and went to Jezreel.

verses.latin_vulgate: et manus Domini facta est super Eliam, accinctisque lumbis currebat ante Achab, donec veniret in Jezrahel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיַד־יְהֹוָ֗ה הָֽיְתָה֙ אֶל־אֵ֣לִיָּ֔הוּ וַיְשַׁנֵּ֖ס מׇתְנָ֑יו וַיָּ֙רׇץ֙ לִפְנֵ֣י אַחְאָ֔ב עַד־בֹּאֲכָ֖ה יִזְרְעֶֽאלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the hand of the Lord was upon Elias, and he girded up his loins, and ran before Achab, till he came to Jezrahel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herran käsi oli Elian päällä, ja hän vyötti kupeensa ja juoksi Ahabin edellä, siihenasti kuin hän tuli Jisreeliin.
verses.king_james: And the hand of the Lord was on Elijah; and he girded up his loins, and ran before Ahab to the entrance of Jezreel.
